## What

Brief description of the change. Link to issue if applicable: `Closes #123`.

## Why

The problem this solves. Include real-world repro if it's a bugfix.

## How

Key implementation notes. Anything reviewers should know — design tradeoffs, breaking changes, follow-ups.

## Tests

- [ ] Added/updated tests for the new behavior
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] Verified the CLI surface didn't drift (`youtube-advisor --help`)

## Notes for the reviewer

(Optional) Things you're unsure about, or specific bits you'd like extra eyes on.
